title: Pattern Dojo
description: Master the 18 algorithm patterns behind the NeetCode 150 — intuitively and interactively. NEW: Code Dojo, a from-scratch in-browser judge — solve 36 curated problems in a real editor and run your JavaScript against sample + hidden tests in a sandboxed Web Worker (infinite loops are caught as time-limits), with every solve graduating that pattern into spaced review. Plus 18 keyboard-driven step-through visualizers with shareable frame deep-links, a pattern-recognition trainer, a full SM-2 spaced-repetition engine with mastery tracking, a daily review dashboard, pattern-of-the-day, streaks, guided per-problem approaches, a printable complexity cheat-sheet, a ⌘K command palette, and a light/dark theme.
